overall.description: First-person perspective from a bus driver's cabin driving through a rainy European city. The bus exits a depot and navigates through residential streets before joining main road traffic. The footage appears to be from a bus simulator game with realistic rain effects and vehicle physics.

events.description: bus begins moving forward from stationary position in the depot
exits covered depot area into open rainy street

agents.ego_description: starting the bus engine and slowly pulling out of the depot parking area, navigating toward the exit

entered.detail: large grey concrete industrial building with multiple windows forming the depot structure
tall grey concrete wall marking the depot boundary
red sedan parked near the depot exit

segments.scene_description: The bus begins stationary inside a concrete bus depot with rain streaming down the windshield. As the vehicle starts moving, it slowly navigates past a red parked car on the right and exits the sheltered depot area into the rainy exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential side street approaching main intersection

events.description: approaching stop sign at the intersection ahead
executing left turn onto the main multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: navigating through wet residential streets, slowing for the stop sign, then turning left onto the main arterial road

entered.detail: multi-story grey apartment building with regular window patterns
red octagonal stop sign marking the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a narrow residential street with apartment buildings visible on the right. It approaches a stop sign at an intersection, slows down, and then executes a left turn onto a wider main road.

events.description: accelerating to cruising speed while overtaking slower traffic

agents.ego_description: cruising along the main road at moderate speed, overtaking a silver car on the left while following distant traffic

notable_agents.action: silver car being overtaken on the left side of the bus

entered.detail: tall metal street light pole along the sidewalk
paved dividing strip separating the road directions

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates onto a wide multi-lane road with apartment buildings now lining both sides. It overtakes a silver car while street lamps and parked vehicles line the wet pavement. The windshield wipers work continuously against the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with traffic control

events.description: stopping behind black van at red traffic light
accelerating from stop as traffic light changes to green

agents.ego_description: following a black van, coming to a complete stop at a red traffic light, then proceeding when the signal changes

notable_agents.action: black Mercedes van stopped ahead at the traffic light, then accelerating forward

entered.detail: dark colored Mercedes Sprinter van directly ahead in the same lane
overhead traffic signal showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and stops behind a black van at a red traffic light on the wet main road. After the light changes to green, the bus accelerates forward, continuing through the urban residential area in heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it transitions from a sheltered depot into the heavy rain of a dense urban residential area. It begins stationary inside a concrete depot with rain streaming down the windshield, slowly navigating past a parked red car to exit into the open weather. As the bus moves forward, the scene shifts to a narrow residential street lined with apartment buildings, where the vehicle slows to a stop before executing a left turn onto a wider main road. The environment then expands into a multi-lane thoroughfare with buildings on both sides, where the bus accelerates past a silver car while windshield wipers work continuously against the downpour. Finally, the camera comes to a halt behind a black van at a red traffic light before accelerating forward once more into the wet city landscape.
